message:
fix(config,email_notify): rebrand default paths + prefixes from wa to ft (ft-wn3yc)

This repo was renamed wa → ft (wezterm_automata → frankenterm) on
2026-02-10 but the runtime defaults baked into Config::default() and
EmailNotifyConfig::default() still emitted wa-branded paths, which
leaked out to every first-run user and every release builds's
example output. The config docs, log-resolved path, and examples all
claimed `ft` but the serialized defaults said `wa`.

Fix the concrete call sites:

crates/frankenterm-core/src/config.rs
- default_data_dir():
    macOS:  ~/Library/Application Support/wa → .../ft
    Linux:  ~/.local/share/wa            → ~/.local/share/ft
- NativeEventsConfig::default().socket_path:
    /tmp/wa/events.sock → /tmp/ft/events.sock
- MetricsConfig::default().prefix:
    "wa" → "ft"  (affects the Prometheus metric prefix emitted
    at /metrics, e.g. wa_requests_total → ft_requests_total)
- Config::load doc comment: search order now documents
    $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/ft/ft.toml or ~/.config/ft/ft.toml
- GeneralConfig.data_dir doc-comment: reflect ft default
- New test ft_wn3yc_default_config_uses_ft_branded_defaults pins
  all four defaults so future branding drift fails fast.

crates/frankenterm-core/src/email_notify.rs
- EmailNotifyConfig::default().subject_prefix:
    "[wa]" → "[ft]"
- Doc example's from/subject_prefix updated to ft branding.
- Existing unit test updated to assert "[ft]" instead of "[wa]"
  (the only value coming from Default — the `from` field is
  example-only and already carries a placeholder address).
- New test ft_wn3yc_email_default_subject_prefix_is_ft_branded
  asserts the default subject prefix stays pinned to "[ft]".

No behavioral changes beyond the default string values: installed
users with existing config files pointing at ~/.local/share/wa keep
working (the data_dir is not auto-migrated). New installs + reset
defaults land on ft-branded paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
